race.comment: CALL OUT (2) improved sharply on his fifth two starts back with success over 1300m at Barcaldine two-and-a-half weeks ago, getting home by 2.5 lengths after being in contention on the corner. This doesn't look as hard so he is likely to play a big role. MONDAY CHOICE (12) was a placegetter on dirt over 1200m at this track two back but missed the frame on turf over 1200m at Rockhampton last time. Strong contender back on the dirt. Worth another chance. ZOUSTRONG (5) has been thereabouts since getting off the mark four runs back, the latest effort a second over 1200m at Julia Creek. Has the pace to be in a prominent position from the outset. Will be in this for a long way. FINAL COMMENT (6) is experiencing a win drought, extended last start when fifth over 1400m at this track. Suitably placed so anticipating a better run this time.
